skill.name: email-campaign-writer
skill.description: Generate email campaign copy from product details, including subject lines, body copy, CTA text, and A/B test ideas.
skill.summary: Creates email campaign drafts with subject options, CTA copy, and A/B testing ideas.
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: The static weak cryptography finding at SKILL.md:4 is a false positive from descriptive campaign text, not code. The entropy finding at SKILL.md:1 is also a false positive because the file is plain Markdown front matter and Chinese text, with no binary or encrypted payload. No prompt injection, data exfiltration, network access, scripts, or external command behavior was found.

low_findings.title: Static Finding Dismissed: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: The flagged line is the skill description for email marketing output: product information, five subject options, body text, CTA, and A/B testing ideas. It contains no cryptographic API, hash function, executable code, or security-sensitive operation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced line is plain descriptive metadata. There is no code context or cryptographic usage to support the static finding.

low_findings.title: Static Finding Dismissed: High File Entropy
low_findings.description: The flagged location is the opening front matter delimiter in a plain Markdown file. The file content is readable skill metadata and instructions, so the entropy heuristic does not indicate obfuscation or encrypted content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual review found only readable Markdown and Chinese text. No encoded payload, binary data, or hidden execution path is present.

content.value_statement: Marketing teams need fast campaign drafts that still match product goals. This skill turns product details into subject lines, body copy, CTA text, and A/B test ideas.
actual_capabilities: Generates email marketing copy from product information.
Provides five subject line options for a campaign.
Drafts email body copy for promotional messages.
Creates CTA wording for campaign actions.
Suggests A/B testing ideas for campaign variants.
limitations: Does not send emails or connect to email platforms.
Does not verify deliverability, spam risk, or inbox placement.
Requires human review for brand voice, claims, and compliance.
Depends on the quality of the product and audience details provided.

use_cases.title: Launch Product Promotions
use_cases.description: Create first-draft promotional emails with subject options, message body, and CTA ideas.

use_cases.title: Draft Client Campaigns
use_cases.description: Turn a campaign brief into usable email copy and variant ideas for review.

use_cases.title: Plan Team Experiments
use_cases.description: Generate A/B test angles for email subject lines, offers, and calls to action.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Campaign Draft
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner prompt for a simple product promotion.
prompt_templates.prompt: Write an email campaign for this product: [product]. Audience: [audience]. Goal: [goal]. Include five subject lines, body copy, and one CTA.

prompt_templates.title: Audience-Focused Email
prompt_templates.scenario: Adds customer pain points and offer details.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an email campaign for [product] targeting [audience]. Pain point: [pain point]. Offer: [offer]. Include subject lines, body copy, CTA, and tone notes.

prompt_templates.title: A/B Campaign Variants
prompt_templates.prompt: Draft two email campaign variants for [product]. Test angle A: [angle]. Test angle B: [angle]. Include subject lines, body copy, CTA, and test rationale.

prompt_templates.title: Full Campaign Brief
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced prompt for structured campaign planning.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this campaign brief to create a complete email draft: product, audience, offer, objections, proof points, brand tone, CTA, and success metric. Include A/B testing recommendations.

output_examples.input: Product launch email for a project management app aimed at freelancers.
output_examples.output: Five subject line choices, a concise promotional email, CTA options, and A/B test ideas comparing productivity and deadline-focused angles.

output_examples.input: Discount campaign for an online course targeting first-time buyers.
output_examples.output: A benefit-led email draft with urgency wording, clear enrollment CTA text, and subject line variants for offer and outcome testing.

output_examples.input: Reactivation campaign for inactive newsletter subscribers.
output_examples.output: A warm re-engagement email, subject lines that test curiosity against value, and CTA copy that invites a low-friction return.

best_practices: Provide product benefits, target audience, offer details, and desired action.
Review every claim for accuracy, brand fit, and legal compliance.
Use the A/B ideas to test one clear variable at a time.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for a campaign without product or audience details.
Do not publish generated claims without fact checking them.
Do not use every subject line at once in the same test.

faq.question: Can this skill send email campaigns?
faq.answer: No. It only helps draft campaign copy and testing ideas.

faq.question: Does it create subject lines?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill is designed to provide five subject line options.

faq.question: Can it write CTA copy?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest CTA wording that matches the campaign goal.

faq.question: Does it support A/B testing plans?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest campaign variants and test ideas for comparison.

faq.question: Can I use it with Claude, Codex, or Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The report lists Claude, Codex, and Claude Code as supported tools.

faq.question: Should I review the output before use?
faq.answer: Yes. Review copy for accuracy, compliance, tone, and brand requirements.
